creator: marius@nuenneri.ch
text:
On Tue, Jan 12, 2010 at 20:30, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/mumble,
>
> Please note that PR ports/142750 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142750

Dear committer,

I approve this patch. Please add
@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps
@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/128x128
to pkg-plist.
